stories.summary: The four major chatbots — OpenAI’s ChatGPT, Google’s Gemini, Anthropic’s Claude and xAI’s Grok — are struggling to fairly and accurately answer questions about elections and geopolitics, according to a new study from Forum AI. stories.summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall. The exact timing remains uncertain.
